---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
---
```{=html}
<!-- Three.js Library -->
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r134/three.min.js"></script>

<!-- WebGL Background Canvas -->
<canvas id="bg-canvas" style="position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; z-index: -1; width: 100vw; height: 100vh;"></canvas>

<!-- Main Container -->
<div class="container" style="padding: 0 2rem 4rem 2rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;">
  
  <div class="hero-section">
    <h1 class="hero-title">Hello, I'm <span class="hero-highlight">Lemon</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Exploring Information Theory, Machine Learning, and beyond.</p>
  </div>

  <hr style="border: 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); margin: 4rem 0;">

  <div class="section-title" style="margin-bottom: 3rem; text-align: center;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: #fff;">Notes</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="glass-grid">
    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Linear Algebra and Matrix Mechanics for Machine Learning</h3>
      <p>Foundational concepts of vector spaces, matrix representations, and geometric transformations.</p>
      <a href="notes/linear-algebra.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Matrix Decompositions for Machine Learning</h3>
      <p>Core algorithms and theorems for factorizing matrices into fundamental components.</p>
      <a href="notes/matrix-decompositions.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Matrix Calculus for Machine Learning</h3>
      <p>Techniques for computing gradients, derivatives, and optimization over matrix structures.</p>
      <a href="notes/matrix-calculus.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Optimization for Machine Learning</h3>
      <p>Mathematical methods, iterative algorithms, and frameworks for finding optimal solutions.</p>
      <a href="notes/optimization.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Probability for Machine Learning</h3>
      <p>The fundamental mathematics of uncertainty, random variables, and probability distributions.</p>
      <a href="notes/probability.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Information Theory for Machine Learning</h3>
      <p>Mathematical approaches to quantifying information, entropy, and statistical divergence.</p>
      <a href="notes/information-theory.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Reinforcement Learning</h3>
      <p>Formal frameworks for sequential decision-making, dynamic programming, and agent-based learning.</p>
      <a href="notes/reinforcement-learning.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Probabilistic Models for Machine Learning</h3>
      <p>Modeling data distributions, variational inference, and modern generative architectures.</p>
      <a href="notes/probabilistic-ml.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Stochastic Dynamics</h3>
      <p>Continuous-time stochastic processes, differential equations, and dynamic sampling methods.</p>
      <a href="notes/stochastic-dynamics.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<script src="/assets/bg-contour.js"></script>
<script src="/assets/card-tilt.js"></script>
```
